ksa_text: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems, methods, and tools used to collect, store, maintain, and govern each type throughout the data lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-011 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.421 composite (highest: NICE at 0.421) and is in_scope for the Master Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Master Data Manager.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.421 is market-validated for Master Data Manager. Final decision: include.
